name: Llama 3.3 70B
tagline: 70B instruction-tuned text model delivering quality comparable to Llama 3.
metaDescription: Llama 3.3 70B (Meta), released 2024-12-06 — part of the Llama 3 line. 70B instruction-tuned text model delivering quality comparable to Llama 3.1 405B / 3.2 90…
overview: Llama 3.3 70B is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 3 line. Released 2024-12-06. The previous-generation open-weight dense (text and vision) Llama line, spanning the 3.0 through 3.3 point releases.
What's notable in this version: 70B instruction-tuned text model delivering quality comparable to Llama 3.1 405B / 3.2 90B at much lower cost, especially on instruction following.
